info.title: Bharat Sangam Backend API
info.description: OpenAPI documentation for the Bharat Sangam backend. Most endpoints return a shared JSON shape with `status`, `message`, and `data`. Some ticket validation failures currently return HTML strings from the controller, which is called out on those endpoints.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Event creation and public event lookups

tags.name: Public Forms
tags.description: Public-facing contact, feedback, and subscriber endpoints

VolunteerTokenResponse.description: Volunteer login returns the token string directly in `data`.

bookingType.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the booking type

post.description: Intended as an admin-only endpoint. In the current codebase the middleware call is missing explicit roles, so requests may be rejected until that is corrected.

get.description: Intended as an admin-only endpoint. In the current codebase the middleware call is missing explicit roles, so requests may be rejected until that is corrected.
Intended as an admin-only endpoint. In the current codebase the middleware call is missing explicit roles, so requests may be rejected until that is corrected.

put.description: Intended as an admin-only endpoint. In the current codebase the middleware call is missing explicit roles, so requests may be rejected until that is corrected.

post.summary: Create a venue via admin route alias

get.description: This route is mounted, but it currently points to an unfinished controller implementation and may not return a final JSON payload until completed.

get.summary: Get the latest event with populated venue, booking type, and artist data
Get capacity metrics for the latest event

post.description: Creates the booking immediately, decrements available seats on the latest event, and queues ticket generation/email work asynchronously.

400.description: Tickets sold out or invalid input

get.summary: Get ticket details by booking code
get.description: On invalid or missing `u_id`, the current controller can return an HTML snippet instead of JSON.

put.description: Protected by the volunteer JWT secret. Admin JWTs are listed in the middleware call, but the current route first validates against the volunteer secret.

400.description: Already used, over-limit, or invalid input

post.description: The current implementation accepts only Gmail addresses and rejects duplicate feedback from the same email.
The current implementation accepts only Gmail addresses and rejects duplicates.
